meritBadgeRequirements._note: Illustrative requirement lists for prototype testing. Wording is paraphrased — replace with exact text from the current official BSA pamphlet before going live, and re-check on every BSA annual update. The 'complete' field encodes optionality: 'all' (must complete every child), 'any' (any one child counts), or 'n-of' with completeN.
